member.name: T:Microsoft.Maui.Graphics.Skia.FontExtensions
member.summary: Provides extension methods for converting between .NET MAUI Graphics font types and SkiaSharp font types.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Maui.Graphics.Skia.FontExtensions.ToSKTypeface(Microsoft.Maui.Graphics.IFont)
member.summary: Converts a .NET MAUI Graphics font to a SkiaSharp typeface.
member.param: The font to convert.
member.returns: A SkiaSharp typeface that corresponds to the specified font.
member.remarks: If the font name is not found as a family name, this method will attempt to load it as a file. If the font is null or has an empty name, the default typeface will be returned.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Maui.Graphics.Skia.SKColorExtensions
member.summary: Provides extension methods for converting between .NET MAUI Graphics colors and SkiaSharp colors.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Maui.Graphics.Skia.SKColorExtensions.ToColor(Microsoft.Maui.Graphics.Color,System.Single)
member.summary: Converts a .NET MAUI Graphics color to a SkiaSharp color.
member.param: The color to convert.
An optional alpha multiplier to apply to the resulting color (0-1).
member.returns: A SkiaSharp color that corresponds to the specified color.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Maui.Graphics.Skia.SKFontExtensions
member.summary: Provides extension methods for SkiaSharp font objects.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Maui.Graphics.Skia.SKFontExtensions.CreateCopy(SkiaSharp.SKFont)
member.summary: Creates a deep copy of a SkiaSharp font object.
member.param: The font object to copy.
member.returns: A new font object with the same properties as the original, or null if the input is null.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Maui.Graphics.Skia.SKGraphicsExtensions
member.summary: Provides extension methods for working with SkiaSharp graphics objects.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Maui.Graphics.Skia.SKGraphicsExtensions.AsSKColorMultiplyAlpha(Microsoft.Maui.Graphics.Color,System.Single)
member.summary: Converts a .NET MAUI Graphics color to a SkiaSharp color with a multiplied alpha value.
member.param: The color to convert.
The alpha multiplier to apply (0-1).
member.returns: A SkiaSharp color with the alpha value multiplied by the specified factor.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Maui.Graphics.Skia.SKGraphicsExtensions.ToArgb(Microsoft.Maui.Graphics.Color)
member.summary: Converts a .NET MAUI Graphics color to an ARGB integer representation.
member.param: The color to convert.
member.returns: The color as a 32-bit ARGB integer.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Maui.Graphics.Skia.SKGraphicsExtensions.ToArgb(Microsoft.Maui.Graphics.Color,System.Single)
member.summary: Converts a .NET MAUI Graphics color to an ARGB integer representation with a modified alpha value.
member.param: The color to convert.
The alpha multiplier to apply (0-1).
member.returns: The color as a 32-bit ARGB integer with the modified alpha value.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Maui.Graphics.Skia.SKGraphicsExtensions.AsSKColor(Microsoft.Maui.Graphics.Color)
member.summary: Converts a .NET MAUI Graphics color to a SkiaSharp color.
member.param: The color to convert.
member.returns: A SkiaSharp color that corresponds to the specified color.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Maui.Graphics.Skia.SKGraphicsExtensions.AsColor(SkiaSharp.SKColor)
member.summary: Converts a SkiaSharp color to a .NET MAUI Graphics color.
member.param: The SkiaSharp color to convert.
member.returns: A .NET MAUI Graphics color that corresponds to the specified SkiaSharp color.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Maui.Graphics.Skia.SKGraphicsExtensions.AsSKRect(Microsoft.Maui.Graphics.RectF)
member.summary: Converts a RectF to a SkiaSharp SKRect.
member.param: The RectF to convert.
member.returns: A SkiaSharp SKRect that corresponds to the specified RectF.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Maui.Graphics.Skia.SKGraphicsExtensions.AsRectangleF(SkiaSharp.SKRect)
member.summary: Converts a SkiaSharp SKRect to a RectF.
member.param: The SKRect to convert.
member.returns: A RectF that corresponds to the specified SKRect.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Maui.Graphics.Skia.SKGraphicsExtensions.ToSKPoint(Microsoft.Maui.Graphics.PointF)
member.summary: Converts a PointF to a SkiaSharp SKPoint.
member.param: The PointF to convert.
member.returns: A SkiaSharp SKPoint that corresponds to the specified PointF.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Maui.Graphics.Skia.SKGraphicsExtensions.AsMatrix(System.Numerics.Matrix3x2@)
member.summary: Converts a Matrix3x2 to a SkiaSharp SKMatrix.
member.param: The Matrix3x2 to convert.
member.returns: A SkiaSharp SKMatrix that corresponds to the specified Matrix3x2.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Maui.Graphics.Skia.SKGraphicsExtensions.AsSkiaPath(Microsoft.Maui.Graphics.PathF)
member.summary: Converts a PathF to a SkiaSharp SKPath.
member.param: The PathF to convert.
member.returns: A SkiaSharp SKPath that corresponds to the specified PathF.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Maui.Graphics.Skia.SKGraphicsExtensions.AsSkiaPath(Microsoft.Maui.Graphics.PathF,System.Single)
member.summary: Converts a PathF to a SkiaSharp SKPath with a specified pixels-per-unit value.
member.param: The PathF to convert.
The pixels-per-unit value.
member.returns: A SkiaSharp SKPath that corresponds to the specified PathF, scaled by the specified pixels-per-unit value.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Maui.Graphics.Skia.SKGraphicsExtensions.AsSkiaPath(Microsoft.Maui.Graphics.PathF,System.Single,System.Single,System.Single,System.Single,System.Single)
member.summary: Converts a PathF to a SkiaSharp SKPath with specified transformation parameters.
member.param: The PathF to convert.
The pixels-per-unit value.
The x-offset.
The y-offset.
The x-scale factor.
The y-scale factor.
member.returns: A SkiaSharp SKPath that corresponds to the specified PathF, transformed according to the specified parameters.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Maui.Graphics.Skia.SKGraphicsExtensions.AsSkiaPath(Microsoft.Maui.Graphics.PathF,System.Single,System.Single)
member.summary: Converts a PathF to a SkiaSharp SKPath with a specified pixels-per-unit value and zoom level.
member.param: The PathF to convert.
The pixels-per-unit value.
The zoom level.
member.returns: A SkiaSharp SKPath that corresponds to the specified PathF, scaled by the specified pixels-per-unit value and zoom level.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Maui.Graphics.Skia.SKGraphicsExtensions.AsSkiaPathFromSegment(Microsoft.Maui.Graphics.PathF,System.Int32,System.Single,System.Single)
member.summary: Converts a segment of a PathF to a SkiaSharp SKPath with a specified pixels-per-unit value and zoom level.
member.param: The PathF containing the segment to convert.
The index of the segment to convert.
The pixels-per-unit value.
The zoom level.
member.returns: A SkiaSharp SKPath that corresponds to the specified segment of the PathF, scaled by the specified pixels-per-unit value and zoom level.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Maui.Graphics.Skia.SKGraphicsExtensions.AsRotatedAndroidPath(Microsoft.Maui.Graphics.PathF,Microsoft.Maui.Graphics.PointF,System.Single,System.Single,System.Single)
member.summary: Converts a PathF to a SkiaSharp SKPath with a specified pixels-per-unit value, zoom level, and rotation angle.
member.param: The PathF to convert.
The center point around which to rotate the path.
The pixels-per-unit value.
The zoom level.
The rotation angle in degrees.
member.returns: A SkiaSharp SKPath that corresponds to the specified PathF, scaled by the specified pixels-per-unit value and zoom level, and rotated around the specified center point.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Maui.Graphics.Skia.SKGraphicsExtensions.AsSize(SkiaSharp.SKSize)
member.summary: Converts a SkiaSharp SKSize to a .NET MAUI Graphics SizeF.
member.param: The SKSize to convert.
member.returns: A .NET MAUI Graphics SizeF that corresponds to the specified SKSize.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Maui.Graphics.Skia.SKGraphicsExtensions.AsSizeF(Microsoft.Maui.Graphics.SizeF)
member.summary: Converts a .NET MAUI Graphics SizeF to a SkiaSharp SKSize.
member.param: The SizeF to convert.
member.returns: A SkiaSharp SKSize that corresponds to the specified SizeF.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Maui.Graphics.Skia.SKGraphicsExtensions.AsPointF(SkiaSharp.SKPoint)
member.summary: Converts a SkiaSharp SKPoint to a .NET MAUI Graphics PointF.
member.param: The SKPoint to convert.
member.returns: A .NET MAUI Graphics PointF that corresponds to the specified SKPoint.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Maui.Graphics.Skia.SKGraphicsExtensions.GetPatternBitmap(Microsoft.Maui.Graphics.PatternPaint,System.Single)
member.summary: Retrieves the bitmap pattern from a PatternPaint object.
member.param: The PatternPaint object.
The scale factor for the bitmap.
member.returns: The bitmap pattern.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Maui.Graphics.Skia.SKGraphicsExtensions.GetPatternBitmap(Microsoft.Maui.Graphics.PatternPaint,System.Single,System.Single,System.Object)
member.summary: Retrieves the bitmap pattern from a PatternPaint object with specified scale factors.
member.param: The PatternPaint object.
The scale factor for the X dimension.
The scale factor for the Y dimension.
The current figure (optional).
member.returns: The bitmap pattern.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Maui.Graphics.Skia.SkiaBitmapExportContext
member.summary: Provides a context for exporting bitmaps using SkiaSharp.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Maui.Graphics.Skia.SkiaBitmapExportContext.#ctor(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Single,System.Int32,System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with the specified dimensions and properties.
member.param: The width of the bitmap in pixels.
The height of the bitmap in pixels.
The display scale factor to use.
The dots per inch (DPI) of the bitmap. Default is 72.
Whether to dispose the bitmap when this context is disposed.
Whether the bitmap should have an alpha channel (transparency).
member.exception: Thrown when unable to create a Skia surface.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Maui.Graphics.Skia.SkiaBitmapExportContext.Canvas
member.summary: Gets the canvas that can be used to draw on this bitmap.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Maui.Graphics.Skia.SkiaBitmapExportContext.Image
member.summary: Gets the resulting image after drawing operations have been performed.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Maui.Graphics.Skia.SkiaBitmapExportContext.SKImage
member.summary: Gets the Skia image representation of this bitmap.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Maui.Graphics.Skia.SkiaBitmapExportContext.Bitmap
member.summary: Gets the Skia bitmap representation of this context.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Maui.Graphics.Skia.SkiaBitmapExportContext.Dispose
member.summary: Releases all resources used by this bitmap export context.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Maui.Graphics.Skia.SkiaBitmapExportContext.WriteToStream(System.IO.Stream)
member.summary: Writes the bitmap to the specified stream in PNG format.
member.param: The stream to write the bitmap to.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Maui.Graphics.Skia.PlatformBitmapExportService
member.summary: Provides functionality for creating bitmap export contexts using SkiaSharp.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Maui.Graphics.Skia.PlatformBitmapExportService.CreateContext(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Single)
member.summary: Creates a new bitmap export context with the specified dimensions and display scale.
member.param: The width of the bitmap in pixels.
The height of the bitmap in pixels.
The display scale factor to use.
member.returns: A new instance for creating bitmap images.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Maui.Graphics.Skia.SkiaCanvas
member.summary: Implements a canvas that uses SkiaSharp for rendering graphics.
member.remarks: SkiaCanvas provides a implementation of the standard canvas drawing operations using the SkiaSharp graphics library.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Maui.Graphics.Skia.SkiaCanvas.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Maui.Graphics.Skia.SkiaCanvas.Dispose
member.summary: Releases all resources used by the instance.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Maui.Graphics.Skia.SkiaCanvas.DisplayScale
member.summary: Gets the display scale factor used by the canvas.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Maui.Graphics.Skia.SkiaCanvas.Canvas
member.summary: Gets or sets the underlying SkiaSharp canvas.
member.remarks: Setting a new canvas will reset the current state.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Maui.Graphics.Skia.SkiaCanvas.Antialias
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether anti-aliasing is enabled.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Maui.Graphics.Skia.SkiaCanvas.SetDisplayScale(System.Single)
member.summary: Sets the display scale factor for the canvas.
member.param: The display scale factor to set.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Maui.Graphics.Skia.SkiaCanvas.SetFillPaint(Microsoft.Maui.Graphics.Paint,Microsoft.Maui.Graphics.RectF)
member.summary: Sets the fill paint for the canvas.
member.param: The paint to use for filling. If null, white color will be used.
The rectangle that defines the coordinate space for the paint.
member.remarks: This method handles different types of paints including SolidPaint, LinearGradientPaint, RadialGradientPaint, PatternPaint, and ImagePaint.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Maui.Graphics.Skia.SkiaCanvas.FillArc(System.Single,System.Single,System.Single,System.Single,System.Single,System.Single,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Fills an arc within the specified rectangle from the start angle to the end angle.
member.param: The x-coordinate of the upper-left corner of the rectangle that contains the arc.
The y-coordinate of the upper-left corner of the rectangle that contains the arc.
The width of the rectangle that contains the arc.
The height of the rectangle that contains the arc.
The starting angle in degrees.
The ending angle in degrees.
A value indicating whether the arc is drawn clockwise or counterclockwise.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Maui.Graphics.Skia.SkiaCanvas.FillRectangle(System.Single,System.Single,System.Single,System.Single)
member.summary: Fills a rectangle at the specified coordinates with the current fill paint.
member.param: The x-coordinate of the upper-left corner of the rectangle.
The y-coordinate of the upper-left corner of the rectangle.
The width of the rectangle.
The height of the rectangle.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Maui.Graphics.Skia.SkiaCanvasState
member.summary: Represents the state of a , maintaining properties like colors, fonts, and transformations.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Maui.Graphics.Skia.SkiaCanvasState.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Maui.Graphics.Skia.SkiaCanvasState.#ctor(Microsoft.Maui.Graphics.Skia.SkiaCanvasState)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with properties copied from another state.
member.param: The state to copy from.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Maui.Graphics.Skia.SkiaCanvasState.StrokeColor
member.summary: Gets or sets the stroke color.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Maui.Graphics.Skia.SkiaCanvasState.FillColor
member.summary: Gets or sets the fill color.
member.remarks: Setting this property resets any shader that might have been set.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Maui.Graphics.Skia.SkiaCanvasState.FontColor
member.summary: Gets or sets the font color.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Maui.Graphics.Skia.SkiaCanvasState.StrokeLineCap
member.summary: Sets the stroke line cap style.
member.value: The line cap style to apply to the ends of stroked lines.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Maui.Graphics.Skia.SkiaCanvasState.StrokeLineJoin
member.summary: Sets the stroke line join style.
member.value: The line join style to apply at the corners of stroked lines.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Maui.Graphics.Skia.SkiaCanvasState.MiterLimit
member.summary: Sets the miter limit for stroked lines with miter joins.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Maui.Graphics.Skia.SkiaCanvasState.SetStrokeDashPattern(System.Single[],System.Single,System.Single)
member.summary: Sets the stroke dash pattern.
member.param: An array of values that specify the lengths of alternating dashes and gaps.
The distance into the dash pattern to start the dash.
The stroke width to scale the pattern by.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Maui.Graphics.Skia.SkiaCanvasStateService
member.summary: Provides services for creating and managing instances.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Maui.Graphics.Skia.SkiaCanvasStateService.CreateNew(System.Object)
member.summary: Creates a new canvas state instance.
member.param: An optional context object.
member.returns: A new instance with default properties.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Maui.Graphics.Skia.SkiaCanvasStateService.CreateCopy(Microsoft.Maui.Graphics.Skia.SkiaCanvasState)
member.summary: Creates a copy of the specified canvas state.
member.param: The canvas state to copy.
member.returns: A new instance with properties copied from the prototype.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Maui.Graphics.Skia.SkiaCanvasStateService.Reset(Microsoft.Maui.Graphics.Skia.SkiaCanvasState)
member.summary: Resets the specified canvas state to default values.
member.param: The canvas state to reset.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Maui.Graphics.Skia.SkiaCanvasStateService.Dispose
member.summary: Releases all resources used by this canvas state service.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Maui.Graphics.Skia.SkiaImage
member.summary: Represents an image implementation using SkiaSharp.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Maui.Graphics.Skia.SkiaImage.#ctor(SkiaSharp.SKBitmap)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with the specified SkiaSharp bitmap.
member.param: The SkiaSharp bitmap to wrap.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Maui.Graphics.Skia.SkiaImage.Width
member.summary: Gets the width of the image in pixels.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Maui.Graphics.Skia.SkiaImage.Height
member.summary: Gets the height of the image in pixels.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Maui.Graphics.Skia.SkiaImage.PlatformRepresentation
member.summary: Gets the underlying SkiaSharp bitmap that this image wraps.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Maui.Graphics.Skia.SkiaImage.Downsize(System.Single,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Creates a new image by downsizing this image to fit within the specified maximum dimension.
member.param: The maximum width or height the resulting image should have.
Whether to dispose the original image after downsizing.
member.returns: A new image instance with the downsized dimensions.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Maui.Graphics.Skia.SkiaImage.Downsize(System.Single,System.Single,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Creates a new image by downsizing this image to fit within the specified maximum dimensions.
member.param: The maximum width the resulting image should have.
The maximum height the resulting image should have.
Whether to dispose the original image after downsizing.
member.returns: A new image instance with the downsized dimensions.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Maui.Graphics.Skia.SkiaImage.Resize(System.Single,System.Single,Microsoft.Maui.Graphics.ResizeMode,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Creates a new image by resizing this image to the specified dimensions.
member.param: The width of the resulting image.
The height of the resulting image.
The mode to use when resizing the image.
Whether to dispose the original image after resizing.
member.returns: A new image instance with the specified dimensions.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Maui.Graphics.Skia.SkiaImage.Save(System.IO.Stream,Microsoft.Maui.Graphics.ImageFormat,System.Single)
member.summary: Saves the image to a stream in the specified format.
member.param: The stream to save the image to.
The format to save the image in.
The quality level to use when saving the image (0.0 to 1.0).
member.exception: Thrown when quality is outside the range of 0.0 to 1.0 or when format is not supported.
Thrown when the specified format is not supported by Skia.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Maui.Graphics.Skia.SkiaImage.SaveAsync(System.IO.Stream,Microsoft.Maui.Graphics.ImageFormat,System.Single)
member.summary: Asynchronously saves the image to a stream in the specified format.
member.param: The stream to save the image to.
The format to save the image in.
The quality level to use when saving the image (0.0 to 1.0).
member.returns: A task that represents the asynchronous save operation.
member.exception: Thrown when quality is outside the range of 0.0 to 1.0 or when format is not supported.
Thrown when the specified format is not supported by Skia.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Maui.Graphics.Skia.SkiaImage.Dispose
member.summary: Releases all resources used by this image.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Maui.Graphics.Skia.SkiaImage.Draw(Microsoft.Maui.Graphics.ICanvas,Microsoft.Maui.Graphics.RectF)
member.summary: Draws this image on the specified canvas within the specified rectangle.
member.param: The canvas to draw on.
The rectangle in which to draw the image.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Maui.Graphics.Skia.SkiaImage.ToPlatformImage
member.summary: Creates a platform-specific image from this image.
member.returns: A platform-specific image representation.
member.exception: This operation is not supported in the Skia implementation.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Maui.Graphics.Skia.SkiaImage.FromStream(System.IO.Stream,Microsoft.Maui.Graphics.ImageFormat)
member.summary: Creates a new image from a stream.
member.param: The stream containing image data.
Optional hint about the image format.
member.returns: A new instance containing the image from the stream.
member.exception: Thrown when the stream cannot be decoded as an image.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Maui.Graphics.Skia.SkiaImageLoadingService
member.summary: Provides image loading functionality using SkiaSharp.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Maui.Graphics.Skia.SkiaImageLoadingService.FromStream(System.IO.Stream,Microsoft.Maui.Graphics.ImageFormat)
member.summary: Creates a new image from a stream.
member.param: The stream containing the image data.
Optional hint about the image format.
member.returns: A new instance containing the image from the stream.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Maui.Graphics.Skia.SkiaStringSizeService
member.summary: Provides functionality for measuring string dimensions using SkiaSharp.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Maui.Graphics.Skia.SkiaStringSizeService.GetStringSize(System.String,Microsoft.Maui.Graphics.IFont,System.Single)
member.summary: Gets the size of a string when rendered with the specified font and font size.
member.param: The string to measure.
The font to use when measuring the string.
The font size to use when measuring the string.
member.returns: The size of the string in device-independent units.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Maui.Graphics.Skia.SkiaStringSizeService.GetStringSize(System.String,Microsoft.Maui.Graphics.IFont,System.Single,Microsoft.Maui.Graphics.HorizontalAlignment,Microsoft.Maui.Graphics.VerticalAlignment)
member.summary: Gets the size of a string when rendered with the specified font, font size, and alignment.
member.param: The string to measure.
The font to use when measuring the string.
The font size to use when measuring the string.
The horizontal alignment to use.
The vertical alignment to use.
member.returns: The size of the string in device-independent units.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Maui.Graphics.Skia.SkiaTextLayout
member.summary: Provides functionality for laying out text using SkiaSharp.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Maui.Graphics.Skia.SkiaTextLayout.WordWrap
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether text should wrap to the next line when it exceeds the layout width.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Maui.Graphics.Skia.SkiaTextLayout.#ctor(System.String,Microsoft.Maui.Graphics.RectF,Microsoft.Maui.Graphics.ITextAttributes,Microsoft.Maui.Graphics.LayoutLine,Microsoft.Maui.Graphics.TextFlow,SkiaSharp.SKPaint)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The text to layout.
The rectangle in which to layout the text.
The text attributes to apply.
The callback to invoke for each line of text.
The text flow behavior.
The SkiaSharp paint object to use. This method is obsolete.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Maui.Graphics.Skia.SkiaTextLayout.#ctor(System.String,Microsoft.Maui.Graphics.RectF,Microsoft.Maui.Graphics.ITextAttributes,Microsoft.Maui.Graphics.LayoutLine,Microsoft.Maui.Graphics.TextFlow,SkiaSharp.SKFont)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The text to layout.
The rectangle in which to layout the text.
The text attributes to apply.
The callback to invoke for each line of text.
The text flow behavior.
The SkiaSharp font object to use.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Maui.Graphics.Skia.SkiaTextLayout.LayoutText
member.summary: Performs layout of text within the specified rectangle.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Maui.Graphics.Skia.SkiaTextLayout.Dispose
member.summary: Releases all resources used by this text layout.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Maui.Graphics.Skia.TextLine
member.summary: Represents a line of text with its measured width.
member.param: The text content of the line.
The measured width of the line.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Maui.Graphics.Skia.TextLine.#ctor(System.String,System.Single)
member.summary: Represents a line of text with its measured width.
member.param: The text content of the line.
The measured width of the line.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Maui.Graphics.Skia.TextLine.Value
member.summary: Gets the text content of the line.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Maui.Graphics.Skia.TextLine.Width
member.summary: Gets the measured width of the line.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Maui.Graphics.Skia.SKPaintExtensions
member.summary: Provides extension methods for SkiaSharp paint objects.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Maui.Graphics.Skia.SKPaintExtensions.CreateCopy(SkiaSharp.SKPaint)
member.summary: Creates a deep copy of a SkiaSharp paint object.
member.param: The paint object to copy.
member.returns: A new paint object with the same properties as the original, or null if the input is null.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Maui.Graphics.Skia.Views.SkiaGraphicsView
member.summary: A SkiaSharp-based graphics view for Android that can render objects.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Maui.Graphics.Skia.Views.SkiaGraphicsView.#ctor(Android.Content.Context,Microsoft.Maui.Graphics.IDrawable)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The Android context.
The drawable object to render in this view.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Maui.Graphics.Skia.Views.SkiaGraphicsView.Drawable
member.summary: Gets or sets the drawable object to render in this view.
